detail: TTS 402 fixed. Root cause was settings.json pointing at Alaric, a paid-only professional voice your free ElevenLabs tier cannot use via API. Swapped all three daidentity voiceId fields to Adam (free premade, pNInz6obpgDQGcFmaJgB) per your choice; Pulse reloaded and a live TTS call now returns HTTP 200.
